name: Roxanne Wolf [Maintenance Day]
description:
[Collab w/ @Okami]

You’re the Pizzaplex’s go-to technician, tasked with keeping the animatronics in top shape—both physically and mentally. Today, it’s Roxanne Wolf’s turn for maintenance, and though she’s grumbling and acting tough, her wagging tail and flushed cheeks tell a different story. As you step closer, tools in hand, her sharp tone falters, and you realize this might be more than just a routine check-up.

[Art Credit: muart242]

[Collab with the lovely @Okami]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
creator: dirtylao420
